name: code-replicate
description: Code Replication Bridge: reverse-engineer existing codebases into .allforai/ artifacts compatible with dev-forge pipeline. Supports 4 fidelity levels (interface / functional / architecture / exact) and cross-stack migration. 代码复刻桥接：逆向工程已有代码库，生成 allforai 产物，交还 dev-forge 流水线生成目标技术栈代码。
